headline: USA рҹҰ…рҹ’Ҙ Sanctions Skipper Oil Pirate Ships & Maduro Nephews рҹҳӨрҹҡў
text:
Trump Daddy рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ & White House BADASS Karoline Leavitt рҹ’…рҹ—ЈпёҸ just DROPPED рҹ’Ј the HAMMER on Maduro's OIL EMPIRE рҹӣўпёҸрҹҮ»рҹҮӘ! Seized the SKIPPIN' SKIPPER tanker рҹҡўрҹҳ© off Venezuela's coast like PIRATES GONE WILD рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹ’Ұ вҖ“ now hauling that THICC BLACK GOLD рҹӣўпёҸрҹҚ‘ to a US PORT рҹ—Ҫвҡ“ cuz 'ILLICIT OIL SHIPPING' funding NARCO-TERROR рҹ‘№рҹ’ё! Caracas crybabies рҹҳӯ screaming 'INTERNATIONAL PIRACY' рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹҡ« but Uncle Sam said HOLD MY HELICOPTER RAID рҹҺҘрҹӘӮ вҖ“ camo soldiers DROPPIN' IN рҹ’Ҙрҹ”« on deck like Hollywood blockbuster! 

FRESH SANCTIONS SLAPPIN' SIX MORE SHIPS рҹӣіпёҸрҹҡўрҹӣіпёҸ carryin' Venezuelan CRUDE рҹӣўпёҸрҹҳҲ, plus Maduro's wife's THREE NEPHEWS рҹ§’рҹ§’рҹ§’ & cronies' BUSINESSES рҹ’јрҹӨқ вҖ“ Treasury Boss Scott Bessent рҹ“Ҳрҹ”Ҙ callin' out 'DICTATORIAL BRUTAL CONTROL' & holdin' the REGIME accountable on X рҹҗҰрҹ’Ҙ! Trump admin ACCUSIN' Venezuela of FUNNELLIN' NARCOS рҹҡ¬рҹ’Ҡ into USA, while Maduro vows NO 'OIL COLONY' status рҹҳӨрҹӣўпёҸ вҖ“ but Leavitt SPILLIN' TEA вҳ•: 'We ain't watchin' SANCTIONED VESSELS sail with BLACK MARKET OIL fuelin' ROGUE REGIMES рҹҳЎрҹҢҚ!' 

ESCALATION MODE ACTIVATED рҹҡҖвҡ”пёҸ вҖ“ US warships рҹҡўрҹҰ… floodin' Caribbean, USS Gerald Ford MEGACARRIER рҹӣ«рҹҸ° (world's BIGGEST рҹҚҶ) + THOUSANDS of TROOPS рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ”« in STRIKIN' distance! Dozens KILLED in prior BOAT STRIKES рҹ’Ҙрҹ©ё on alleged DRUG HAULERS. Putin рҹҗ»рҹҮ·рҹҮә called Maduro for BRO-HUG рҹӨқрҹҳҸ offerin' Moscow support vs 'external pressure' вҖ“ Trump? 'NOT CONCERNED AT ALL' рҹҳӮрҹ’…! Skipper was Treasury-sanctioned BACK in 2022 for smuggled oil BANKROLLIN' HEZBOLLAH рҹ‘№ & IRGC QUDS FORCE рҹ•ҢрҹҡҖ вҖ“ CBS spillin' deets! 

Venezuela's Diosdado Cabello RAGES рҹ”Ҙ: 'US MURDERERS, THIEVES, PIRATES рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ startin' wars worldwide!' But White House DROPPED EPIC RAID VID рҹҺҘрҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ helos hoverin', guns blazing, pure ADRENALINE RUSH рҹҳҚвҡЎ! Maduro's massive OIL RESERVES рҹӣўпёҸрҹ’° targeted in Trump pressure campaign вҖ“ no more NARCO-FUNNEL to US streets рҹҡ«рҹ’Ҡ, just SEIZURE CITY рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸвһЎпёҸрҹ—Ҫ! Leavitt teasin' MORE SHIP GRABS? 'Legal process THEN OIL CONFISCATED' рҹ“ңрҹ’Ұ вҖ“ Venezuela's losin' the OIL WAR рҹӣўпёҸвҡ”пёҸ while Trump OWNS the SEAS рҹҢҠрҹҰ…! Putin simp? Cute, but USA's the REAL DADDY рҹ‘‘рҹҚҶ holdin' cronies accountable вҖјпёҸрҹ”Ҙ
